simple_types.name: Interrupt_Name
simple_types.code:
type Interrupt_Name is
  (POWER_CLOCK_Interrupt,
   RADIO_Interrupt,
   UART0_Interrupt,
   SPI0_TWI0_Interrupt,
   SPI1_TWI1_Interrupt,
   Unused_Interrupt_1,
   GPIOTE_Interrupt,
   ADC_Interrupt,
   …,
   Unused_Interrupt_7);

documentation.description:
Register a handler for the given interrupt. There can be only one handler
for each interrupt so the previous one, if any, will be removed.
